transformations: restrict each room section into declared overlap

visible_condition.plain_language: Two rooms agree in one region and pull apart in another.

available_affordances.purpose: Change how the Cistern receives one declared Loom coordinate and observe the seam.

research_frame.question: Can a participant identify a local incompatibility without treating either room or person as globally wrong?
research_frame.hypothesis: Showing restricted room sections before naming gluing obstruction will support a bounded explanation of the seam.
observable_behavior: participant links the weight change to the seam change
participant preserves the possibility that both rooms remain locally coherent
alternative_explanations: the seam change may reflect the chosen mismatch metric rather than a stable property of the rooms
the receiving-weight adjustment may hide another unresolved coordinate
expected_failure_modes: participant interprets mismatch as falsehood or bad faith
technical term appears before the visible consequence
falsifier: participants repeatedly cannot identify which action changed the seam
the static equivalent yields a different causal explanation from the animated path
abstention_conditions: the mismatch metric cannot distinguish the tested alternatives

contradictions: local agreement coexists with overlap mismatch

allowed_claims: declared restriction mismatch changed under the fixture action

causal_trace: operator selected the declared receiving-weight adjustment
the Cistern restriction changed in the overlap
the mismatch measure decreased without becoming zero
the seam remained visible as a soft fold
contradictions: local coherence persisted while the overlap remained imperfect
unresolved_relations: whether a different mismatch metric would reverse the classification

static_equivalent.summary: A before/after seam diagram shows the declared weight change and the remaining mismatch.
steps: show after mismatch and unresolved residue

name.plain_language: The rooms still fit differently at their shared edge.
non_equivalence: local coherence is not global equivalence

transfer_context.shared_relation_candidate: locally coherent views resist total merger
observable_correspondence: both contexts preserve a visible residual after comparison
alternative_explanations: the residual may arise from missing source material rather than incompatible models
abstention_conditions: the comparison lacks a shared observation basis
